# Launch new app by 2026-04-01

We need to ship the new app by the deadline. Features A and B are critical for the launch. The team has committed to this date and stakeholders are aligned. Tasks: finalize copy, complete design review, dev handoff by 2026-03-20. No slip allowed—deadline is fixed.
